items.claim: Kamaru Usman has not been the same fighter since the head kick knockout loss to Leon Edwards.
items.quote: Manma not the same since the Edwards headkick.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has 11 total submission wins in his career.
items.quote: Well, he does have 11 submission wins.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has two submission wins in the UFC.
items.quote: he does have two submission wins in the UFC.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis uses awkward, looping strikes and finds unconventional ways to win.
items.quote: It's awkward looping [ __ ] finding weird ways to win.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman possesses elite finishing instincts.
items.quote: the biggest truth about Usuzman is his finishing instincts.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis's savagery and output will become more apparent as the fight progresses into the later rounds.
items.quote: I think the savagery of Drius Duplexi will start to show itself a little bit later on into the fight.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is capable of securing takedowns and controlling Dricus Du Plessis early in the fight.
items.quote: I could see Usuzman getting takedowns and controlling early
